steps.instruction: Fill a pot with water and place it on the stove.
Bring the water to a boil.
Gently place the eggs in the boiling water.
Boil the eggs for 9-12 minutes depending on desired doneness.
Remove the eggs and place them in cold water to stop cooking.

safety_tips: Always use caution when handling boiling water.
Use a slotted spoon to place and remove eggs from boiling water.
